adjustTiers((uint104,uint32,uint32,uint1.details: Only the collection owner or an operator with `ADJUST_721_TIERS` permission can call this.Added tiers must respect this hook's flags (e.g. `noNewTiersWithVotes`, `noNewTiersWithReserves`).

params.tierIdsToRemove: The IDs of the tiers to remove.
params.tiersToAdd: The tiers to add, as an array of `JB721TierConfig` structs.

afterCashOutRecordedWith((address,uint25.details: Reverts if the calling contract is not one of the project's terminals.

params.context: The cash out context passed in by the terminal.

afterPayRecordedWith((address,uint256,ui.details: Reverts if the calling contract is not one of the project's terminals.

params.context: The payment context passed in by the terminal.

params.owner: The address to check the balance of.

returns.balance: The number of NFTs the address owns across this hook's tiers.

beforeCashOutRecordedWith((address,addre.details: Sets this contract as the cash out hook. Part of `IJBRulesetDataHook`.This function is used for NFT cash outs, and will only be called if the project's ruleset has `useDataHookForCashOut` set to `true`.

params.context: The cash out context passed to this contract by the `cashOutTokensOf(...)` function.

returns.cashOutCount: The amount of tokens that should be considered cashed out.
returns.cashOutTaxRate: The cash out tax rate influencing the reclaim amount.
returns.effectiveSurplusValue: The surplus to use for reclaim calculation.
returns.hookSpecifications: The amount and data to send to cash out hooks (this contract) instead of returning to the beneficiary.
returns.totalSupply: The total amount of tokens that are considered to be existing.

beforePayRecordedWith((address,address,(.details: Overrides the base to compute tier split amounts from each tier's `splitPercent`.

params.context: The payment context from the terminal.

returns.hookSpecifications: Specifies this hook as the pay hook, with the split amount to forward.
returns.weight: The adjusted weight for project token minting (reduced when splits route funds away).

params.tokenIds: The token IDs of the NFTs to get the combined cash-out weight of.

params.checkpointsDeployer: The deployer used to deploy checkpoint module clones during initialization.
params.directory: A directory of terminals and controllers for projects.
params.prices: A contract that exposes price feeds for currency conversions.
params.rulesets: A contract storing and managing project rulesets.
params.splits: The contract that stores and manages splits.
params.store: The contract which stores the NFT's data.
params.trustedForwarder: The trusted forwarder for the ERC2771Context.

params.tokenId: The token ID of the NFT.

returns._0: The address of the NFT's first owner.

initialize(uint256,string,string,string,.details: Called by `JB721TiersHookDeployer` after cloning. Reverts if called twice or if the project ID is zero.

params.baseUri: The URI to use as a base for full NFT `tokenUri`s.
params.contractUri: A URI where this contract's metadata can be found.
params.flags: A set of additional options which dictate how the hook behaves.
params.initialProjectId: The ID of the project this hook is associated with.
params.name: The name of the NFT collection.
params.symbol: The symbol representing the NFT collection.
params.tiersConfig: The NFT tiers and pricing context to initialize the hook with. The tiers must be sorted by category (from least to greatest).
params.tokenUriResolver: An optional contract responsible for resolving the token URI for each NFT's token ID.

isTrustedForwarder(address).details: Indicates whether any particular address is the trusted forwarder.

mintFor(uint16[],address).details: Only the collection owner or an operator with `MINT_721` permission can call this.

params.beneficiary: The address to mint the NFTs to.
params.tierIds: The IDs of the tiers to mint from.

returns.tokenIds: The IDs of the newly minted tokens.

params.reserveMintConfigs: The tier IDs and counts specifying how many reserves to mint from each tier.

params.count: The number of reserved NFTs to mint.
params.tierId: The ID of the tier to mint reserved NFTs from.

owner().details: If `projectId` is non-zero, resolves via `PROJECTS.ownerOf()`. If that call reverts, returns `address(0)`, making owner-gated functions fail closed.

returns.currency: The currency used for tier prices.
returns.decimals: The number of decimals used in tier prices.

renounceOwnership().details: Can only be called by the current owner. This is irreversible.

setDiscountPercentOf(uint256,uint256).details: Only the collection owner or an operator with `SET_721_DISCOUNT_PERCENT` permission can call this.

params.tierId: The ID of the tier to set the discount of.

setDiscountPercentsOf((uint32,uint16)[]).details: Only the collection owner or an operator with `SET_721_DISCOUNT_PERCENT` permission can call this.

params.configs: An array of tier ID + discount percent pairs to apply.

setMetadata(string,string,string,string,.details: Only this contract's owner or an operator with the `SET_721_METADATA` permission can set the metadata.

params.baseUri: The new base URI. Send empty to leave unchanged.
params.contractUri: The new contract URI. Send empty to leave unchanged.
params.encodedIpfsUri: The encoded IPFS URI to set.
params.encodedIpfsUriTierId: The ID of the tier to set the encoded IPFS URI of.
params.name: The new collection name. Send empty to leave unchanged.
params.symbol: The new collection symbol. Send empty to leave unchanged.
params.tokenUriResolver: The new URI resolver. Pass `IJB721TokenUriResolver(address(this))` to leave it unchanged; `address(0)` clears the resolver.

setPermissionId(uint8).details: Can only be called by the current owner. Address-owned contracts can only set `permissionId` to 0. Records the current owner so delegation is ignored while a different owner holds the project NFT.

params.permissionId: The permission ID to use for `onlyOwner` delegation.

params.interfaceId: The ID of the interface to check for adherence to.

tokenURI(uint256).details: Defers to the `tokenUriResolver` if it is set. Otherwise, use the `tokenUri` corresponding with the NFT's tier.

params.tokenId: The token ID of the NFT to get the metadata URI of.

returns._0: The token URI from the `tokenUriResolver` if it is set. If it isn't set, the token URI for the NFT's tier.

transferOwnership(address).details: The `permissionId` is reset to 0 on transfer to prevent permission clashes for the new owner. The new owner must explicitly call `setPermissionId()` to configure owner-level permission delegation.

params.newOwner: The address to transfer ownership to.

transferOwnershipToProject(uint256).details: The `permissionId` is reset to 0 on transfer to prevent the previous owner's delegates from retaining access. The new project owner must call `setPermissionId()` to re-enable delegation.The `projectId` must fit within a `uint88` and the project must already exist.

params.projectId: The ID of the project to transfer ownership to.

trustedForwarder().details: Returns the address of the trusted forwarder.

DIRECTORY().notice: The directory of terminals and controllers for projects.

METADATA_ID_TARGET().notice: The ID used when parsing metadata.

PRICES().notice: The contract that exposes price feeds for currency conversions.

PROJECTS().notice: The `JBProjects` ERC-721 contract used to resolve project-based ownership.

RULESETS().notice: The contract storing and managing project rulesets.

SPLITS().notice: The contract that stores and manages splits.

STORE().notice: The contract that stores and manages data for this contract's NFTs.

adjustTiers((uint104,uint32,uint32,uint1.notice: Add new NFT tiers or remove existing ones. Added tiers get sequential IDs and must be sorted by category. Removed tiers stop accepting new mints but existing NFTs remain valid.

afterCashOutRecordedWith((address,uint25.notice: Burns the specified NFTs upon token holder cash out, reclaiming funds from the project's balance for `context.beneficiary`. Part of `IJBCashOutHook`.

afterPayRecordedWith((address,uint256,ui.notice: Mints NFTs to `context.beneficiary` upon payment if conditions are met. Part of `IJBPayHook`.

balanceOf(address).notice: The total number of this hook's NFTs that an address holds (from all tiers).

baseURI().notice: The base URI for the NFT `tokenUris`.

beforeCashOutRecordedWith((address,addre.notice: The data calculated before a cash out is recorded in the terminal store. This data is provided to the terminal's `cashOutTokensOf(...)` transaction.

beforePayRecordedWith((address,address,(.notice: Called by the terminal before recording a payment. Calculates how much of the payment should be routed to tier-based splits vs. kept by the project, and adjusts the minting weight accordingly.

cashOutWeightOf(uint256[]).notice: The combined cash-out weight of specific NFTs. Divide by `totalCashOutWeight()` to get the fraction of surplus these NFTs can reclaim. Weight is based on the original tier price, not any discount paid.

checkpoints().notice: The checkpoint module that manages IVotes-compatible checkpointed voting power for this hook's NFTs.

firstOwnerOf(uint256).notice: The address that originally received an NFT (typically the payer). Tracked separately from the current owner so it persists through transfers, useful for provenance and historical voting checkpoints.

hasMintPermissionFor(uint256,(uint48,uin.notice: Required by the IJBRulesetDataHook interfaces. Return false to not leak any permissions.

initialize(uint256,string,string,string,.notice: Initialize a cloned copy of the hook. Sets the project association, ERC-721 name/symbol, pricing context (currency + decimals), metadata URIs, initial tiers, and behavioral flags. Can only be called once per clone — the implementation contract is pre-initialized in its constructor to prevent misuse.

jbOwner().notice: The current ownership state — who owns this contract and how permission delegation is configured.

mintFor(uint16[],address).notice: Manually mint NFTs from specific tiers to a beneficiary, without requiring payment. Only tiers with `allowOwnerMint` enabled can be minted this way.

mintPendingReservesFor((uint32,uint16)[].notice: Mint pending reserved NFTs across multiple tiers in a single call. Reserves accumulate automatically as NFTs are sold (based on each tier's `reserveFrequency`) and anyone can trigger their minting.

mintPendingReservesFor(uint256,uint256).notice: Mint pending reserved NFTs from a specific tier. Anyone can call this — reserves are minted to the tier's reserve beneficiary (or the hook's default). Reverts if the ruleset has reserve minting paused.

owner().notice: Returns the current owner's address. If ownership is project-based, this dynamically resolves to whoever holds the project's ERC-721 NFT right now.

payCreditsOf(address).notice: If an address pays more than the price of the NFT they received, the extra amount is stored as credits which can be cashed out to mint NFTs.

pricingContext().notice: The currency and decimal precision used for this hook's tier prices. For example, if tiers are priced in ETH with 18 decimals, `currency` would be the ETH currency ID and `decimals` would be 18.

projectId().notice: The ID of the project that this contract is associated with.

renounceOwnership().notice: Permanently gives up ownership. After this, no address can call `onlyOwner` functions.

setDiscountPercentOf(uint256,uint256).notice: Set a discount on a tier's price. Discounts reduce the price payers must pay, but don't affect the NFT's cash-out weight (which always uses the original price). The tier must have `cannotIncreaseDiscountPercent` set appropriately.

setDiscountPercentsOf((uint32,uint16)[]).notice: Set discount percentages for multiple tiers in a single call.

setMetadata(string,string,string,string,.notice: Update any combination of this hook's metadata properties in a single call. Pass empty strings or sentinel values for fields you don't want to change.

setPermissionId(uint8).notice: Configures which `JBPermissions` permission ID grants delegate access to `onlyOwner` functions while this contract is project-owned. Set to 0 to disable delegation entirely.

supportsInterface(bytes4).notice: Indicates if this contract adheres to the specified interface.

tokenURI(uint256).notice: The metadata URI of the NFT with the specified token ID.

totalCashOutWeight().notice: The total cash-out weight across all outstanding NFTs and pending reserves. This is the denominator for cash-out calculations — an NFT's share of the surplus is its weight divided by this total.

transferOwnership(address).notice: Transfers ownership of this contract to a new address. Can only be called by the current owner.

transferOwnershipToProject(uint256).notice: Transfers ownership to a Juicebox project, whose ERC-721 NFT holder becomes the owner.
